task_objective: Add diagnostics for intermittent QAM current-game autopopulation and scroll reset behavior, including suspected Ludusavi alias mismatches.
design_decisions: Log QAM context captures only when the detected SteamUI context changes, to avoid noisy 500ms polling logs.
Log current-game selection and no-match outcomes with source, app id, display name, normalized name, dropdown game count, and alias count.
Match current SteamUI game context by Steam app id, then exact normalized name, then Ludusavi alias target.
Retry scroll reset at short delays after QAM open and log scroll position measurements to diagnose Decky focus restoration races.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_frontend_static.py failed with the new diagnostics and alias assertions before implementation
results.pnpm_verify: passed after rerunning with network access because sandboxed pnpm audit failed with EAI_AGAIN
